0.text: Consolidation and ground-glass opacities with air bronchograms in the lower lobe of the right lung, predominantly in the basal segments

1.text: Bilateral pulmonary round-shaped consolidations in the bronchovascular bundles

2.text: Surrounding ground-glass opacities of bilateral pulmonary round-shaped consolidations

3.text: Scattered nodule-like consolidations throughout the lungs
